questionHtml:
Which are the most reactive elements of the alkali metals and halogens?

A.  Lithium and fluorine

B.  Lithium and iodine

C.  Caesium and fluorine

D.  Caesium and iodine

meta.title: Which are the most reactive elements of the alkali metals and halogens? A. Lithium and fluorine B. Lithium and iodine C. Caesium and fluorine D. Caesium and iodine
